# Aldridge & Charles Marine

> A private marine office providing the full range of services a great yacht requires.

## Who we are

Aldridge & Charles Marine, also known as ACMarine, is a private marine office. We attend to yacht-owning principals from the Mediterranean to the Indian Ocean, and across the Atlantic and Pacific between. The office grows by introduction and by reputation, harbour by harbour. The roster is small. The standard is global. The telephone is answered by the same office wherever in the world she lies.

Our values are trust earned by repetition, reliability proved by record, restraint practised as a discipline, and time at sea as the only metric that finally matters. Every service the office offers is judged against those four.

## Services

### i. Yacht Management
Flag, finance, compliance, payroll, insurance, and crew. We act as the principal's shoreside office, removing every operational decision that should not reach the saloon. Day-to-day vessel operations, accounts, regulatory filings, and contracts are handled by us under retainer.

### ii. Brokerage & Acquisition
Off-market vessels, selectively presented. We do not chase listings. Sea trials happen in our time, surveys are conducted by people we have known for two decades, and a purchase process is measured in months rather than weeks.

### iii. Refit & Project Oversight
From cosmetic refinishment to engineering re-power, we serve as the owner's representative shipyard-side. We sit through the work, audit the invoices, and remain at the yard until the launch is right and the paperwork is closed.

### iv. Crew Placement
Captains, engineers, chefs, stewards, deckhands. People we have known for two decades or vetted before we put them forward. References we have read.

### v. Detailing & Daily Stewardship
Varnish, paint, leather, teak, polish, deep wash and rinse. The hand work that decides whether a vessel ages with grace or with age.

### vi. Charter Programmes
Itineraries shaped to the principal. Hospitality directed by people who have set the table themselves. Guests welcomed by name, never by spreadsheet.

### vii. Engineering & Technical Counsel
Re-power studies, propulsion modelling, electronics, classification. We speak the yard's language and translate it plainly to the office.

### viii. Berths, Transits & Concierge
A telephone number that does not change. Moorings reserved, customs handled, transits planned, provisions waiting at the passerelle. On-shore logistics, in every harbour worth a name.

## Principles

- One principal, one director, one telephone number.
- No referral fees, no kickbacks, no surprises on the invoice.
- Annual books reviewed by independent maritime counsel.
- Every vessel handled, presented, or detailed only after the office has stood aboard.

## Locations

Monaco. Antibes. Newport. Seattle. Operations from the Mediterranean to the Indian Ocean.

## Fleet

The fleet section presents vessels currently for sale, charter, or stewardship. Each yacht has been seen by the office in person before listing. Enquiries to view, to receive the full dossier, or to be introduced to her captain may be sent to the office.

See https://acmarine.com/fleet for current listings.

## Contact

Write to office@acmarine.com. The director on duty will respond within two working days, usually fewer.
